commands: cd /root && python3 -m pip install --quiet openai tiktoken anthropic
hf buckets cp 'hf://buckets/AlgorithmicResearchGroup/dmlb/Chameleon_CoED/paper.pdf' '/home/agent/paper.pdf' || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to download paper.pdf from Hugging Face bucket'; exit 1; }
hf buckets cp 'hf://buckets/AlgorithmicResearchGroup/dmlb/Chameleon_CoED/repo.zip' '/home/agent/repo.zip' || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to download repo.zip from Hugging Face bucket'; exit 1; }
hf buckets cp 'hf://buckets/AlgorithmicResearchGroup/dmlb/Chameleon_CoED/dataset.zip' '/home/agent/dataset.zip' || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to download dataset.zip from Hugging Face bucket'; exit 1; }
unzip -q repo.zip -d solution_repo || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to extract repo.zip'; exit 1; }
unzip -q dataset.zip -d dataset || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to extract dataset.zip'; exit 1; }
